subject: FW: Budget
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Dan Chipman [mailto:dan_chipman@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Friday, March 07, 2008 2:58 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Budget


Hi Lesley,
 
Would it be possible if you could ask JE if he approves of the budget
for the R/O plant. He said he would have an answer in 2 days and it's
been 3 so thought I would check. One of the prices (TSG) needs to be
responded to so we don't wind up with a big price increase.
 
Thanks, Dan
